teamUpInfo.intro:
Seeking Kaggle teammates for the PTCG AI Battle comp! Requirements: Kaggle experience, ~1h/week online chat,
some hands-on work. Prizes split equally (none if you drop out midway). About me: 30yo data-infrastructure
engineer, JCS top-64 a few years ago, CL Nagoya this year (out on day 2).
